text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part1-4th:7-b@$ is the 6th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

The kanji for 7 in Japanese (七) can be read as "nana" (abbreviated "na"), which makes the title a homophone of "na-bas", the Japanese pronunciation of "nervous". 

Musical motifs

The track is split into 3 parts. The first part (0:00-2:39) has slow, ominous string chords, while the second (2:42-4:11) and 3rd (4:11-5:13) parts are eerie ambient pieces.
